turns.query: Identify abnormal emission spikes of Hebei Zongheng Group Fengnan Steel Co., Ltd. during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 and determine potential causes.
turns.actual_response:
2025-06-10 至 2025-06-12 期间，河北纵横集团丰南钢铁有限公司共有 72 条有效小时烟气量记录。

分析结果如下：

- 最高小时烟气量：30,422,600.0 立方米
- 峰值出现时间：2025-06-11 06:00
- 峰值相对 2025-06-10 00:00 的偏移：30 小时
- 平均小时烟气量：28,523,663.89 立方米
- 小时烟气量总体标准差：1,344,693.58 立方米
- 最低小时烟气量：25,417,500 立方米
- 中位数小时烟气量：28,749,750 立方米
- 95 分位小时烟气量：30,281,890 立方米

异常尖峰识别结论：

按“均值 + 2 倍总体标准差”作为异常尖峰判定阈值，阈值为 31,213,051.06 立方米。监测期内最高值 30,422,600.0 立方米低于该阈值，因此未识别到统计意义上的异常烟气量尖峰。

峰值小时特征：

2025-06-11 06:00 的烟气量为全时段最高，标准化偏离值为 1.41，属于偏高但未达到异常水平。该小时较上一小时增加 118,600 立方米，随后一小时下降 1,089,400 立方米，表现为短时高位回落，但幅度仍在该时段正常波动范围内。

潜在原因判断：

烟气量与颗粒物排放量的相关性较强，相关系数为 0.91；与一氧化碳排放量的相关性也较强，相关系数为 0.82。这表明高烟气量时段更可能与生产负荷、燃烧强度或含尘烟气处理系统处理量同步升高有关。

烟气量与二氧化硫、氮氧化物的相关性分别为 0.44 和 0.32，相关性较弱到中等，说明本次高位波动并不主要表现为硫、氮污染物同步异常升高。氯化氢排放在该时段无变化，未显示相关异常。

综合判断：

该企业在 2025-06-10 至 2025-06-12 期间未出现统计意义上的异常烟气排放尖峰。2025-06-11 06:00 的最高值更可能是生产负荷或烟气处理量短时升高导致的正常高位波动，而非突发性异常排放事件。建议监管关注烟气量高位时段颗粒物和一氧化碳的同步变化，重点核查相关时段生产负荷、燃烧工况及除尘系统运行记录。
code_snippets:
import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-13 00:00:00"
company_name = "Hebei Zongheng Group Fengnan Steel Co., Ltd."

q_company = text("""
SELECT id, name
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name = :name
LIMIT 10
""")
company_df = pd.read_sql(q_company, engine, params={"name": company_name})
if company_df.empty:
    q_company = text("""
    SELECT id, name
    FROM polluting_company
    WHERE name ILIKE '%Zongheng%' AND name ILIKE '%Fengnan%'
    LIMIT 10
    """)
    company_df = pd.read_sql(q_company, engine)

print("企业匹配数量:", len(company_df))
print(company_df.head(10).to_string(index=False))

company_id = int(company_df.iloc[0]["id"])

q = text("""
WITH base AS (
  SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id
    AND timestamp >= :start_ts
    AND timestamp < :end_ts
    AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n,
         AVG(exhaust_gas)::float AS mean_gas,
         STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas)::float AS std_gas,
         MIN(exhaust_gas)::float AS min_gas,
         MAX(exhaust_gas)::float AS max_gas,
         PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY exhaust_gas)::float AS p95_gas,
         (AVG(exhaust_gas) + 2*STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas))::float AS threshold_2sd
  FROM base
),
peak AS (
  SELECT timestamp AS peak_time, exhaust_gas::float AS peak_gas
  FROM base
  ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC, timestamp
  LIMIT 1
),
spike AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b, stats s
  WHERE b.exhaust_gas > s.threshold_2sd
),
top_hours AS (
  SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas::float AS exhaust_gas,
         ((exhaust_gas - (SELECT mean_gas FROM stats)) / NULLIF((SELECT std_gas FROM stats),0))::float AS z_score,
         nox::float AS nox, so2::float AS so2, pm::float AS pm, co::float AS co
  FROM base
  ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC, timestamp
  LIMIT 8
),
grp AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN b.exhaust_gas > s.threshold_2sd THEN 'spike' ELSE 'non_spike' END AS group_type,
         COUNT(*)::int AS n,
         AVG(exhaust_gas)::float AS avg_exhaust_gas,
         AVG(nox)::float AS avg_nox,
         AVG(so2)::float AS avg_so2,
         AVG(pm)::float AS avg_pm,
         AVG(co)::float AS avg_co,
         AVG(hcl)::float AS avg_hcl
  FROM base b CROSS JOIN stats s
  GROUP BY 1
),
corr AS (
  SELECT CORR(exhaust_gas, nox)::float AS corr_nox,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, so2)::float AS corr_so2,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, pm)::float AS corr_pm,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, co)::float AS corr_co,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, hcl)::float AS corr_hcl
  FROM base
)
SELECT 'stats' AS section, to_jsonb(stats.*) AS payload FROM stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'peak', to_jsonb(peak.*) FROM peak
UNION ALL SELECT 'top_hours', jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(top_hours.*) ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC) FROM top_hours
UNION ALL SELECT 'groups', jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(grp.*) ORDER BY group_type) FROM grp
UNION ALL SELECT 'corr', to_jsonb(corr.*) FROM corr;
""")
res = pd.read_sql(q, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})

payload = dict(zip(res["section"], res["payload"]))
stats = payload["stats"]
peak = payload["peak"]

peak_flue_gas = float(peak["peak_gas"])
mean_flue_gas = float(stats["mean_gas"])
std_flue_gas = float(stats["std_gas"])
peak_flue_gas_offset_hours = int((pd.Timestamp(peak["peak_time"]) - pd.Timestamp(start_ts)).total_seconds() // 3600)

print("统计摘要:", stats)
print("峰值摘要:", {"peak_time": str(peak["peak_time"]), "peak_flue_gas": peak_flue_gas, "peak_flue_gas_offset_hours": peak_flue_gas_offset_hours})
print("最高排放小时样本:", payload["top_hours"])
print("异常/非异常分组均值:", payload["groups"])
print("烟气量与污染物排放相关系数:", payload["corr"])
print("已存储变量:", {"peak_flue_gas": peak_flue_gas, "mean_flue_gas": mean_flue_gas, "std_flue_gas": std_flue_gas, "peak_flue_gas_offset_hours": peak_flue_gas_offset_hours})

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

start_ts = "2025-06-10 00:00:00"
end_ts = "2025-06-13 00:00:00"

# 先按中文关键字定位企业，并只输出匹配摘要
q_company = text("""
SELECT id, name
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name ILIKE '%纵横%' AND name ILIKE '%丰南%' AND name ILIKE '%钢%'
ORDER BY name
LIMIT 10
""")
company_df = pd.read_sql(q_company, engine)
print("企业匹配数量:", len(company_df))
print(company_df.to_string(index=False))

if company_df.empty:
    raise ValueError("未找到匹配企业，需进一步确认企业名称。")

company_id = int(company_df.iloc[0]["id"])

# 先检查指定窗口小时记录量
q_count = text("""
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = :company_id
  AND timestamp >= :start_ts
  AND timestamp < :end_ts
  AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
""")
count_df = pd.read_sql(q_count, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
print("有效小时记录数:", int(count_df.iloc[0]["n"]))

q = text("""
WITH base AS (
  SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl,
         LAG(exhaust_gas) OVER (ORDER BY timestamp) AS prev_gas,
         LEAD(exhaust_gas) OVER (ORDER BY timestamp) AS next_gas
  FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
  WHERE company_id = :company_id
    AND timestamp >= :start_ts
    AND timestamp < :end_ts
    AND exhaust_gas IS NOT NULL
),
stats AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS n,
         AVG(exhaust_gas)::float AS mean_gas,
         STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas)::float AS std_gas,
         MIN(exhaust_gas)::float AS min_gas,
         MAX(exhaust_gas)::float AS max_gas,
         PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY exhaust_gas)::float AS p25_gas,
         PERCENTILE_CONT(0.50) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY exhaust_gas)::float AS median_gas,
         PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY exhaust_gas)::float AS p75_gas,
         PERCENTILE_CONT(0.95) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY exhaust_gas)::float AS p95_gas,
         (AVG(exhaust_gas) + 2*STDDEV_POP(exhaust_gas))::float AS threshold_2sd
  FROM base
),
peak AS (
  SELECT timestamp AS peak_time, exhaust_gas::float AS peak_gas,
         ((exhaust_gas - (SELECT mean_gas FROM stats)) / NULLIF((SELECT std_gas FROM stats),0))::float AS z_score,
         (exhaust_gas - prev_gas)::float AS rise_from_prev,
         (exhaust_gas - next_gas)::float AS fall_to_next,
         nox::float AS nox, so2::float AS so2, pm::float AS pm, co::float AS co, hcl::float AS hcl
  FROM base
  ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC, timestamp
  LIMIT 1
),
spikes AS (
  SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas::float AS exhaust_gas,
         ((exhaust_gas - (SELECT mean_gas FROM stats)) / NULLIF((SELECT std_gas FROM stats),0))::float AS z_score,
         (exhaust_gas - prev_gas)::float AS rise_from_prev,
         (exhaust_gas - next_gas)::float AS fall_to_next,
         nox::float AS nox, so2::float AS so2, pm::float AS pm, co::float AS co, hcl::float AS hcl
  FROM base b CROSS JOIN stats s
  WHERE b.exhaust_gas > s.threshold_2sd
  ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC, timestamp
),
top_hours AS (
  SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas::float AS exhaust_gas,
         ((exhaust_gas - (SELECT mean_gas FROM stats)) / NULLIF((SELECT std_gas FROM stats),0))::float AS z_score,
         nox::float AS nox, so2::float AS so2, pm::float AS pm, co::float AS co, hcl::float AS hcl
  FROM base
  ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC, timestamp
  LIMIT 8
),
grp AS (
  SELECT CASE WHEN b.exhaust_gas > s.threshold_2sd THEN 'spike' ELSE 'non_spike' END AS group_type,
         COUNT(*)::int AS n,
         AVG(exhaust_gas)::float AS avg_exhaust_gas,
         AVG(nox)::float AS avg_nox,
         AVG(so2)::float AS avg_so2,
         AVG(pm)::float AS avg_pm,
         AVG(co)::float AS avg_co,
         AVG(hcl)::float AS avg_hcl
  FROM base b CROSS JOIN stats s
  GROUP BY 1
),
corr AS (
  SELECT CORR(exhaust_gas, nox)::float AS corr_nox,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, so2)::float AS corr_so2,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, pm)::float AS corr_pm,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, co)::float AS corr_co,
         CORR(exhaust_gas, hcl)::float AS corr_hcl
  FROM base
)
SELECT 'stats' AS section, to_jsonb(stats.*) AS payload FROM stats
UNION ALL SELECT 'peak', to_jsonb(peak.*) FROM peak
UNION ALL SELECT 'spikes', COALESCE(jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(spikes.*) ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC), '[]'::jsonb) FROM spikes
UNION ALL SELECT 'top_hours', jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(top_hours.*) ORDER BY exhaust_gas DESC) FROM top_hours
UNION ALL SELECT 'groups', jsonb_agg(to_jsonb(grp.*) ORDER BY group_type) FROM grp
UNION ALL SELECT 'corr', to_jsonb(corr.*) FROM corr;
""")
res = pd.read_sql(q, engine, params={"company_id": company_id, "start_ts": start_ts, "end_ts": end_ts})
payload = dict(zip(res["section"], res["payload"]))
stats = payload["stats"]
peak = payload["peak"]

peak_flue_gas = float(peak["peak_gas"])
mean_flue_gas = float(stats["mean_gas"])
std_flue_gas = float(stats["std_gas"])
peak_flue_gas_offset_hours = int((pd.Timestamp(peak["peak_time"]) - pd.Timestamp(start_ts)).total_seconds() // 3600)

print("统计摘要:", stats)
print("峰值摘要:", {"peak_time": str(peak["peak_time"]), "peak_flue_gas": peak_flue_gas, "peak_flue_gas_offset_hours": peak_flue_gas_offset_hours, "z_score": peak["z_score"], "rise_from_prev": peak["rise_from_prev"], "fall_to_next": peak["fall_to_next"]})
print("异常尖峰小时:", payload["spikes"])
print("最高排放小时:", payload["top_hours"])
print("异常/非异常分组均值:", payload["groups"])
print("烟气量与污染物排放相关系数:", payload["corr"])
print("已存储变量:", {"peak_flue_gas": peak_flue_gas, "mean_flue_gas": mean_flue_gas, "std_flue_gas": std_flue_gas, "peak_flue_gas_offset_hours": peak_flue_gas_offset_hours})
